brief: Geopolitical tensions rise with US-Iran strikes and nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia, while AI labs face scrutiny over training practices. Research explores AI's role in dementia care and information evaluation.
news_summary: US military sites hit by Iranian strikes, Trump threatens retaliation; Tesla profits slide despite revenue growth; House passes defense bill amid Iran war divide.
papers_summary: Papers focus on ethical AI for social connectedness in dementia care, and rhetorical patterns in AI-assisted information evaluation.

en.brief: Geopolitical tensions rise with US-Iran strikes and nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia, while AI labs face scrutiny over training practices. Research explores AI's role in dementia care and information evaluation.
en.news_summary: US military sites hit by Iranian strikes, Trump threatens retaliation; Tesla profits slide despite revenue growth; House passes defense bill amid Iran war divide.
en.papers_summary: Papers focus on ethical AI for social connectedness in dementia care, and rhetorical patterns in AI-assisted information evaluation.

zh.brief: 日本Cool Biz政策引爭議，特朗普被令交出文件，金門機場工程引矛盾，烏克蘭軍總司令被解職，貝克漢推廣足球。研究方面聚焦AI輔助分析與可視化工具。
zh.news_summary: 日本鼓勵男性穿短褲引發女性不滿；特朗普誹謗案強制公開文件；廈門翔安機場設計引金門居民分歧；澤連斯基解除瑟爾斯基職務；貝克漢持續推動美國足球發展。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇論文探討生成式AI在失智照護、程式設計學習與互動可視化中的應用，另有關於火星車駕駛檢索系統的研究。

todays_image.caption: Both highlight unexpected interventions—pelicans aiding in fishing and visual evidence revealing damage from unseen forces.
todays_image.title: Indians Catching Fish with the Help of Pelicans
